page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4r.32xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. It features 128 dedicated physical cores with one thread per core, providing 128 vCPUs of dedicated compute capacity. This hardware configuration is supported by the KVM hypervisor.

The server is equipped with 1024.0 GB of memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. For storage-intensive operations, it includes 7679 GB of local SSD storage. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps. No GPU accelerators are present on this instance type.

Given the combination of high-capacity local SSD storage, dedicated CPU allocation, and a 1:8 memory-to-core ratio, this server is designed for resource-dense workloads. It is highly suited for large-scale databases, memory-intensive analytics, and storage-heavy applications requiring high throughput and low latency.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4r.32xlarge is a high-capacity, storage-and-memory-optimized server built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor operating at 2.7 GHz, with one thread per core. The system is provisioned with 1024.0 GB of RAM, establishing a 1:8 memory-to-core ratio, and includes 7679 GB of local SSD storage. Network connectivity is supported by a 64 Gbps baseline bandwidth. Lacking GPU acceleration, this instance is designed for high-density, non-graphical workloads. The combination of dedicated compute resources, substantial memory, and large local SSD storage makes this server highly suitable for large-scale databases, data warehousing, and intensive transactional processing workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4r.32xlarge is a KVM-based server featuring 128 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, 7679 GB of local SSD storage, and 64 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for database workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4r.32xlarge features 128 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and 7679 GB local SSD storage for high-density database workloads.
tagline: A dedicated 128-core server featuring one terabyte of RAM and seven terabytes of local SSD storage for intensive database workloads.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.7 GHz
1024.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
7679 GB of high-speed local SSD storage
Optimized for large-scale databases and memory-intensive transactional workloads
